title: aurinia rupestris
intro: Aurinia rupestris, also known as Rocky Mountain saxifrage or Rock saxifrage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. Aurinia rupestris can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
